zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor of England於大約1215年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特時，她的父親John King of England50歲，母親Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England30歲。她於1238年1月7日與Simon V de Montfort在英國英格蘭米德萊可維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1275年4月13日在法國崔洛易特蒙塔吉斯享年61歲，埋葬在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特蒙塔吉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor of England于大约1215年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特时，她的父亲John King of England50岁，母亲Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England30岁。她于1238年1月7日与Simon V de Montfort在英国英格兰米德萊可維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1275年4月13日在法国崔洛易特蒙塔吉斯享年61岁，埋葬在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特蒙塔吉斯。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: England
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Middle English Engelond ‘England’. It was probably a formal alternative to English , which is also well evidenced as a surname in England. These names may have been acquired by English landowners who moved in Norman social circles or who lived in a neighbouring country (Scotland, Wales, or Ireland), or by English merchants who traded abroad.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farmsteads so named, from Old Norse eng ‘meadow’ + land ‘land’.
Swedish: ornamental name with the same meaning as 2.

variants.name: English
meanings: English, Scottish, and Welsh: ethnic name from Middle English English, Inglish, Inglis ‘English’ (Old English Englisc), sometimes alternating with Anglo-Norman French Engleis, Engles, Anglais, Angles (Old French Englois). Compare Inglis and England . Among the aristocracy and upper gentry it marked out a man of English ancestry from one of Norman or continental origin. In counties bordering England with Scotland and Wales the name distinguished an Englishman from a Scot or a native Welshman on both sides of the border. The name may also have been acquired by English merchants who traded abroad or who lived and worked in a ‘French’ borough in England (one exclusively administered by Normans).
Irish: in Ireland, this name was used to denote an Englishman, often being adopted for Irish Aingléis ‘Englishman’ or through mistranslation for Mac an Ghallóglaigh, see Gallogly and Golightly .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor of England was born about 1215, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, her father, John King of England, was 50 and her mother, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, was 30. She married Simon V de Montfort on 7 January 1238, in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 13 April 1275, in Montargis, Loiret, Centre, France, at the age of 61, and was buried in Montargis, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor of England est née environ 1215, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, John King of England, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Simon V de Montfort le 7 janvier 1238, à Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 avril 1275, à Montargis, Loiret, Centre, France, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Montargis, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France.

Sie hat am 7. Januar 1238 in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom Simon V de Montfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor of England è nata il circa 1215 nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, John King of England, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Simon V de Montfort il 7 gennaio 1238, nel Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 13 aprile 1275, nel Montargis, Loiret, Centre, Francia, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Montargis, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor of Englandが約1215年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターで生まれた時，父John King of Englandは50歳，母Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of Englandは30歳であった。1238年1月7日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスタープアレイス オフ ウエストミンスターでSimon V de Montfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1275年4月13日にフランスセントアロイアーエトモンタージスで61歳で死去し，フランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーロイアーエトモンタージスにて埋葬された。

ko.Fontrevault Abbey, Fontrevault, Maine-Et: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르
ko.Montargis Abbey, Montargis, Department d: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 몽아르지스
ko.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor of England(이)가 대략 1215년 영국 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John King of England(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1238년 1월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터에서 Simon V de Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1275년 4월 13일 프랑스 세트르 로이렛 몽아르지스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 몽아르지스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor of England nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John King of England, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Simon V de Montfort em 7 de janeiro de 1238, em Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de abril de 1275, em Montargis, Loiret, Centre, França, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Montargis, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França.

ru.Fontrevault Abbey, Fontrevault, Maine-Et: меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.Montargis Abbey, Montargis, Department d: монтаргис, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor of England родилась около 1215 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John King of England было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon V de Montfort 7 января 1238 г. в местности палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 13 апреля 1275 г. в местности монтаргис, лоирет, кентр, Франция в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности монтаргис, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor of England nació aproximadamente 1215, en Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John King of England, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Simon V de Montfort el 7 de enero de 1238, en Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 13 de abril de 1275, en Montargis, Loiret, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Montargis, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia.
